_comment: Lilith Zero — VS Code Copilot sidebar agent hooks template
_instructions: Copy this file to .github/hooks/hooks.json in your repository.
Create lilith-policy.yaml in .github/hooks/ with your security policy.
This template is for the VS Code Copilot SIDEBAR agent (agent mode in the chat panel).
It covers ALL tool calls: editFiles, createFile, runTerminalCommand, #fetch,
pushToGitHub, MCP tools, and any future tools added to the VS Code agent registry.
The only agent activity NOT interceptable is the LLM generating text responses.
VS Code uses PascalCase event names (PreToolUse, PostToolUse) unlike the
GitHub cloud coding agent which uses camelCase (preToolUse, postToolUse).
Security note: Deploy via enterprise image or VS Code policy to prevent
developers from removing or modifying .github/hooks/ on their local machines.
